name: SecurityLocalGenerateSHA512
title: SecurityLocalGenerateSHA512
syntax: long SecurityLocalGenerateSHA512(byte data[], dword dataLength, byte sha512[], dword sha512Length)
description: Generates a SHA512 hash for the given data and using the given key.

parameters.name: dword dataLength
parameters.description: The length of the data to encrypt.

parameters.name: dword sha512Length [In/Out]
parameters.description: The length of the generated SHA512 hash (64 bytes).

return: The length of the generated SHA512
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
